channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [POPULARES] Popular Estate Management: FY26 Financial Results Approved
item.description:
Popular Estate Management Ltd. announced the approval of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, during a Board of Directors meeting held on May 9, 2026. The results, prepared under Ind AS, include an audit report by H. S. Jani & Associates. The board also took note of compliances submitted to the stock exchange for the same period.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Results reviewed by the Audit Committee.
  • Auditor's report by H. S. Jani & Associates included.
  • Compliances submitted to the stock exchange were noted.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POPULAR ESTATE MANAGEMENT LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ADVENZYMES] Advanced Enzyme Tech FY26 Revenue Up 17% to ₹7,458 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Advanced Enzyme Technologies Ltd announced its audited financial results for Q4 and the year ended March 2026. Consolidated revenue for FY26 increased by 17% to ₹7,458 million. Q4 FY26 revenue stood at ₹2,034 million, a 22% increase YoY. EBITDA for Q4 FY26 was ₹632 million, up 39% YoY, with an EBITDA margin of 31%. PAT for Q4 FY26 grew by 69% to ₹453 million, with a PAT margin of 22%. EPS for Q4 FY26 was ₹3.84, compared to ₹2.37 in Q4 FY25.

  • Q4 FY26 revenue increased by 22% YoY to ₹2,034 million.
  • Q4 FY26 EBITDA grew by 39% YoY to ₹632 million, with a 31% margin.
  • Q4 FY26 PAT increased by 69% YoY to ₹453 million, with a 22% margin.
  • FY26 revenue from operations increased by 17% to ₹7,458 million.
  • Domestic sales grew by 51% YoY, accounting for 52% of Q4 FY26 revenue.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Advanced Enzyme Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JYOTHYLAB] Jyothy Labs: Henkel's Pril License Won't Renew Post-May 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jyothy Labs Ltd. announces that Henkel AG & Co. KGaA will not renew the Pril license beyond May 31, 2026. The license agreements, initially signed on May 31, 2011, covered the manufacturing, distribution, marketing, and sale of Pril and Fa brands. Jyothy Labs is currently evaluating available options and will disclose any material developments. The financial impact of this non-renewal is under evaluation.

  • Henkel will not renew the Pril license agreement with Jyothy Labs beyond May 31, 2026.
  • The agreement covered manufacturing, distribution, and sale of Pril and Fa brands.
  • Jyothy Labs is evaluating options and will disclose material developments.
  • The financial impact of the non-renewal is currently under evaluation by Jyothy Labs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jyothy Labs Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [JYOTHYLAB] Jyothy Labs: Henkel's Pril License Non-Renewal Post-2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jyothy Labs Ltd announced that Henkel AG & Co. KGaA will not renew the license agreement for the Pril brand beyond May 31, 2026. The agreements, initially established on May 31, 2011, included automatic renewal provisions until 2026. Jyothy Labs is currently evaluating available options and will disclose any material developments. The financial impact of the non-renewal is under evaluation.

  • Henkel will not renew the Pril license agreement with Jyothy Labs beyond May 31, 2026.
  • The original license agreements were signed on May 31, 2011, with automatic renewal until 2026.
  • Jyothy Labs is evaluating all available options following the non-renewal decision.
  • The financial impact of the non-renewal is currently under evaluation by Jyothy Labs.
  • Jyothy Labs will promptly disclose any material developments related to this matter.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jyothy Labs Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [M&M] M&M April 2026: UV Sales at 26,401 Units, Up from 24,481 YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd. has released its production, sales, and export figures for April 2026. Utility Vehicles sales increased to 26,401 units from 24,481 units in April 2025. Total production for commercial vehicles reached 30,197 units, up from 26,879 units in the previous year. Exports also saw an increase, totaling 5,007 units compared to 3,401 units in April 2025. The sales figures include those from subsidiary companies Mahindra Electric Automobile Limited and Mahindra Last Mile Mobility Limited.

  • Utility Vehicles sales increased to 26,401 units in April 2026 from 24,481 units in April 2025.
  • Total production reached 30,197 units in April 2026, up from 26,879 units year-over-year.
  • Exports increased to 5,007 units in April 2026 compared to 3,401 units in April 2025.
  • UV sales include sales from Mahindra Electric Automobile Limited.
  • Sales include figures from Mahindra Last Mile Mobility Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHINDRA & MAHINDRA LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [JYOTHYLAB] Jyothy Labs: PRIL & Fa License to End; Focus on Exo
item.description:
Jyothy Labs Ltd announced that Henkel will not renew the ‘PRIL’ and ‘Fa’ brand license agreements beyond May 31, 2026, ending a 15-year association. Jyothy Labs will transition to focus on its owned brands, particularly strengthening 'Exo' in the dishwash segment. The company clarifies that the exit of 'Fa' will not materially impact operations. Jyothy Labs will follow the exit process as per the agreements, leveraging its existing manufacturing and distribution capabilities.

  • Henkel will not renew the ‘PRIL’ and ‘Fa’ brand licenses beyond May 31, 2026.
  • Jyothy Labs will focus on scaling up its 'Exo' dishwash brand.
  • The exit of 'Fa' is not expected to materially impact the company's operations.
  • Jyothy Labs will follow the agreed 'Exit' process.
  • Manufacturing facilities are flexible, allowing capacity redeployment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jyothy Labs Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SKPSEC] SKP Securities Recommends ₹2 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
SKP Securities Ltd's board approved audited financial results for FY26 and recommended a dividend of ₹2 per equity share (face value ₹10), subject to shareholder approval at the AGM. The board also approved the re-appointment of G. P. Agrawal & Co. as Internal Auditor for FY27 and Nikunj Pachisia as Executive Director for three years starting August 1, 2026, also subject to shareholder approval. The meeting concluded at 1:45 P.M.

  • SKP Securities recommends a dividend of ₹2 per share for FY26.
  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, were approved.
  • Re-appointment of Internal Auditor G. P. Agrawal & Co. for FY27 approved.
  • Nikunj Pachisia's re-appointment as Executive Director for three years approved, effective August 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKP SECURITIES LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SKPSEC] SKP Securities: Nikunj Pachisia Re-appointed as Executive Director
item.description:
SKP Securities Ltd. has announced the re-appointment of Mr. Nikunj Pachisia as the Executive Director for a further term of three years, effective from August 1, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. This decision was made during a Board of Directors meeting where the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, were also approved. Additionally, a dividend of ₹2 per equity share was recommended, and M/s G. P. Agrawal & Co. was re-appointed as the Internal Auditor for FY 2026-2027.

  • Nikunj Pachisia re-appointed as Executive Director for three years, effective August 1, 2026.
  • Re-appointment is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting.
  • Dividend of ₹2 per equity share recommended for FY 2025-2026, pending shareholder approval.
  • M/s G. P. Agrawal & Co. re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-2027.
  • Audited Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026, were approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKP SECURITIES LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [INNOVISION] Innovision Bags ₹12.67 Cr NHAI User Fee Collection Contract
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Innovision Limited has been engaged by the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) as the user fee collection agency for Aaini Fee Plaza at Jarwal to Bahraich Bypass Section of NH-28C in Uttar Pradesh. The contract, awarded through competitive bidding, also includes upkeep and maintenance of adjacent toilet blocks. The contract is valued at ₹12,66,54,635 for a period of one year.

  • Innovision Ltd to collect user fees for NHAI at Aaini Fee Plaza, UP.
  • Contract includes maintenance of adjacent toilet facilities.
  • The contract value is ₹12.67 Cr for a one-year period.
  • Awarded based on competitive e-tender process.
  • No promoter interest in the entity awarding the contract.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Innovision Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GAGAN] Gagan Gases Board Meeting on 30 May 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Gagan Gases Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 30, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will be held at the company's registered office in Indore.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 30, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results.
  • Results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GAGAN GASES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
